testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Dashboard is not visible! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Dashboard is not visible! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.RegisterSteps.i_should_see_the_dashboard(RegisterSteps.java:56) at ✽.I should see the dashboard(file:///C:/Users/Lenovo/woo-project/src/test/resources/features/Register.feature:14)
